message:
fix(concurrency): use immutable listener arrays and safe index updates

- agent-state-machine.ts: Switch to immutable array updates for
  listeners to prevent iteration issues during concurrent add/remove
- agent-state-machine.ts: Take snapshot of listeners before iteration
  to allow safe modification during event emission
- handoff.service.ts: Re-get set after creation to handle potential
  async interleaving in addToIndex

These patterns prevent race conditions in JavaScript's single-threaded
async execution model where operations can interleave at await points.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
